segments.text: Love smash immediately. I mean that caught him off guard because he's never done that
That pressure uses the peach bomber to get Luma out of there
But still the pressure is still there still thriving you see Samsora struggling to get out of this corner again
Sends a flying 143 percent off stage the Dabuz looking for this up air potential downer goes off
Yes, the spike does not allow him to go back onto the stage. We have ourselves a game five. You know you called it off
